headline: Bio‑Techne and Refeyn Close Critical Gap in Bispecific Antibody and Biosimilar Characterization
summary: Bio‑Techne Corporation (NASDAQ: TECH), a global provider of life science tools, reagents and diagnostic products, and Refeyn, the pioneer in mass photometry technology, today announced a first‑of‑its‑kind integrated workflow for the characterization of charge and size variants in bispecific antibodies and biosimilars.

raw.headline: Bio‑Techne and Refeyn Close Critical Gap in Bispecific Antibody and Biosimilar Characterization
raw.summary: Bio‑Techne Corporation (NASDAQ: TECH), a global provider of life science tools, reagents and diagnostic products, and Refeyn, the pioneer in mass photometry technology, today announced a first‑of‑its‑kind integrated workflow for the characterization of charge and size variants in bispecific antibodies and biosimilars.

headline: Bio‑Techne And Refeyn Launch An Integrated Workflow To Characterize Charge And Size Variants In Bispecific Antibodies And Biosimilars
summary: By combining R&D Systems MauriceFlex™ imaged capillary isoelectric focusing (icIEF) fractionation system with Refeyn's TwoMP mass photometry platform, researchers can directly correlate charge heterogeneity
